_notes: Railway needs three services in the project: this Flask app, Ollama (use deploy/Dockerfile.ollama), and Qdrant (image qdrant/qdrant).
Set OPENAI_API_KEY and ANTHROPIC_API_KEY as Railway shared variables — they are picked up by core_engine automatically.
Pin volumes in the Railway UI for both Ollama (/root/.ollama, ≥10 GB) and Qdrant (/qdrant/storage, ≥5 GB).
